CustomField.formula:
IF((ISBLANK(Posted_For_Organization__c) && ISBLANK(Posted_For_Person__c)) || Posted_For_Person__c = Posted_By__c, HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/contact/"+ Posted_By__r.Id, Posted_By__r.FirstName + " " + Posted_By__r.LastName + IF(RIGHT(Posted_By__r.LastName,1)="s","'","'s")) + " " + TEXT( Type__c) ,
IF(!ISBLANK(Posted_For_Organization__c), HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/contact/"+ Posted_By__r.Id, Posted_By__r.FirstName + " " + Posted_By__r.LastName) + " posted on behalf of " + HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/detail/" + Posted_For_Organization__r.Id, Posted_For_Organization__r.Name) ,
IF(!ISBLANK(Posted_For_Person__c), HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/contact/"+ Posted_By__r.Id, Posted_By__r.FirstName + " " + Posted_By__r.LastName) + " posted on behalf of " + HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/contact/"+ Posted_For_Person__r.Id, Posted_For_Person__r.FirstName + " " + Posted_For_Person__r.LastName) , "")))+
IF(!ISBLANK( Dedicated_To_Household_Organization__c ), " dedicated to the " + HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/detail/" + Dedicated_To_Household_Organization__r.Id, Dedicated_To_Household_Organization__r.Name) ,
IF(!ISBLANK( Dedicated_To_Person__c ), " dedicated to " + HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/contact/"+ Dedicated_To_Person__r.Id, Dedicated_To_Person__r.FirstName + " " + Dedicated_To_Person__r.LastName) , ""))
CustomField.label: Posting Details
